meta.title: Sarif Mubdi Jantika
meta.description: Data Analyst & Accountant — Searching for Treasure in Data

profile.name: Sarif Mubdi Jantika
profile.title: Data Analyst & Accountant
profile.bio: Data Analyst with 12+ years of experience in accounting and tax reporting — now leveraging that deep financial background to build reliable, decision-ready data products. Currently working at Evermos, where I focus on creating a trusted SSOT for finance operations. I design and automate data pipelines using tools like Airflow and transform business requirements into scalable models using SQL, dbt and Python, while also utilizing AI models. I also help enforce data standards and conventions to ensure our datasets remain clean, consistent, and reliable.
profile.bioExtended: My years as an accountant taught me how businesses think — and now I translate those needs into data solutions that actually work for stakeholders. Passionate about connecting the dots between raw data and real business impact, and always looking to grow as a modern data professional.

roles.title: Data Analyst
description: Enable informed decision-making for top management and investors by transforming complex data into high-level corporate insights and integrated financial reporting.

roles.title: Accounting Supervisor
description: Supervise financial reporting, tax compliance, and payroll systems.
Analyze financial data for budgeting and forecasting.
Advise leadership with financial insights and develop dashboards to support decision-making.

roles.title: Team Lead
description: Guide a team of 12 students through the Data Analytics program via simulations and 1-on-1 sessions.
Mentor students on data cleaning, analysis, and visualization.
Provide additional learning support beyond the core curriculum.

roles.title: Vertical Mentor – RevoU x AWS Kampus Merdeka Program CendekiAwan
description: Mentored students on cloud-based analytics solutions in collaboration with AWS.

roles.title: Data Analytics Mentor – RevoU x Kampus Merdeka Program
description: Led simulations and mentoring sessions in data analytics.
Reviewed capstone projects and provided actionable feedback.

roles.title: Data Analyst Associate – RevoU Virtual Labs
description: Conducted feature prioritization, customer segmentation, churn analysis, and KPI monitoring for a stealth startup.

roles.title: Senior Accountant
description: Managed financial reporting and reconciliation for the West Java region.
Provided strategic advice to regional leaders.
Led system migration to ODOO and resolved complex accounting discrepancies.

roles.title: Data Administrator
description: Cleaned user data and tracked budget realization for COVID-19 response.
Designed SOPs and supervised application usage in the field.

roles.title: Finance Ops - Accounts Payable
description: Handled AP processes, collection and payment reconciliation.

projects.title: Demand Planning Analysis
projects.description: Conducted demand planning analysis using dummy data from Astro. Applied forecasting methods including 4-Week Moving Average, Holt-Winters Exponential Smoothing, and Decomposition techniques. Holt-Winters proved most accurate based on MAPE evaluation. Results presented via an interactive Google Sheets dashboard.

projects.title: Google Sheet Convention Script
projects.description: Developed a validation system using Google Apps Script to prevent data entry errors in shared spreadsheets. Each sheet includes a 'Schema' tab defining expected data types per column. Invalid inputs trigger automatic error notifications and are immediately removed, significantly improving data quality and ETL pipeline reliability.
projects.sneakPeekLabel: Sneak Peek of Schema Validation Scenario

education.description: Taking the program concentration for enterprise systems that focuses on developing the design and improvement of enterprise system integration using information technology. The thesis is carried out by conducting multi-variate statistical research.
education.thesis: Influence of Intellectual Capital, Knowledge Sharing, and Innovation on Indonesian Startup Companies
